channel.title: _metapages on James Akl
channel.description: Recent content in _metapages on James Akl

item.title: About
item.description: I am a roboticist with a background in engineering, mathematics, and science. Currently, I am a Doctoral Researcher at Worcester Polytechnic Institute working in the Manipulation & Environmental Robotics Lab. Interests My main interests are in Autonomous & Intelligent Systems — their research, development, applications, and commercialization. For this, I focus on the relevant advances, sciences, and practices within: Robotics & Automation Artificial Intelligence Control & Dynamical Systems Mathematics & Formal Systems Software & Computing Systems Mechatronic Systems I also find biologically-driven fields (e.

item.title: Projects
item.description: Some of my personal projects are showcased below. [View tags] Convex Analysis & Optimization: Select Works Collection of interesting problems with my proofs and solutions. Numerical Analysis & Implementation: 1D PDE [GitHub] Numerical linear algebraic solution of a time–dependent wave PDE. Finite Element Analysis & Implementation: 1D PDE [PDF][GitHub] Designing and optimizing a finite element solution to a 1D PDE. Inverse Problems for Disturbance Observer Control [PDF][GitHub] Regularization and optimization applied to DOB control.

item.title: Research
item.description: This page is under construction. [[View tags](/ptags)] -- [**Research Project Title**](/link/) `[`[**`PDF`**](/fem-convdiff.pdf)`][`[**`GitHub`**](https://github.com/james-akl/fem-convdiff)`]` Concise and complete project description. ***Keywords***     *Mathematics,   Control theory,   Optimization,   MATLAB* [**Ionic Buoyancy Engines: Finite Element Modeling and Experimental Validation**](/link/) `[`[**`Preprint`**](/fem-convdiff.pdf)`]` Concise and complete project description. ***Keywords***     *Mathematics,   Control theory,   Optimization,   MATLAB* --

item.title: Resume
item.description: You may view my resume in either color theme. View in light theme View in dark theme I value openness and transparency, but also confidentiality. Hence, my educational and professional backgrounds are shared in detail. For private information, please request directly at james-akl@outlook.com.

item.title: Writings
item.description: Some of my personal writings are listed below. [View tags] Reading Spatial Transforms Different ways to interpret a homogeneous (rigid-body) transform. A Tour of Robot Mechanics Broad but rigorous glide over robot kinematics and dynamics. Defining a Robot An evolving attempt to answer “What is a robot?” in a prescriptive manner.
